mapper.select: SELECT M.MENU_ID AS menuId , M.MENU_CODE AS menuCode , M.MENU_NAME AS menuName , M.MENU_PATH AS menuPath , M.PARENT_MENU_ID AS parentMenuId , M.SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder , M.USE_YN AS useYn FROM MENU M INNER JOIN ROLE_MENU RM ON M.MENU_ID = RM.MENU_ID INNER JOIN ROLE R ON RM.ROLE_ID = R.ROLE_ID WHERE R.ROLE_CODE = #{roleCode} AND COALESCE(RM.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND M.USE_YN = 'Y' AND R.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY M.SORT_ORDER ASC, M.MENU_ID ASC

/* MenuMapper.selectAllForTree */ SELECT M.MENU_ID AS menuId , M.MENU_CODE AS menuCode , M.MENU_NAME AS menuName , M.MENU_PATH AS menuPath , M.PARENT_MENU_ID AS parentMenuId , M.SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder , M.USE_YN AS useYn FROM MENU M /* 관리자 트리: 미사용(USE_YN=N) 포함 — 화면에서 구분·복구 */ ORDER BY M.SORT_ORDER ASC, M.MENU_ID ASC

SELECT M.MENU_ID AS menuId , M.MENU_CODE AS menuCode , M.MENU_NAME AS menuName , M.MENU_PATH AS menuPath , M.PARENT_MENU_ID AS parentMenuId , M.SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder , M.USE_YN AS useYn FROM MENU M
ORDER BY
M.MENU_CODE M.MENU_NAME M.MENU_PATH M.USE_YN M.SORT_ORDER
ASC DESC
, M.MENU_ID ASC LIMIT #{safeSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT M.MENU_ID AS menuId , M.MENU_CODE AS menuCode , M.MENU_NAME AS menuName , M.MENU_PATH AS menuPath , M.PARENT_MENU_ID AS parentMenuId , M.SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder , M.USE_YN AS useYn FROM MENU M WHERE M.MENU_ID = #{menuId}
mapper.update: UPDATE MENU SET USE_YN = 'N' , UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId}
